key_finding: K-only null space SURVIVES maximum-effort disconfirmation. Combined Exp 032+033: K-only 6/56 (10.7%), V-only 0/57 (0.0%), Fisher p=0.013. V-only with optimized hyperparams still CANNOT redirect answers. Only K produces genuine numeric redirects.
evidence_impact: Strong — K-only null space now statistically significant (p=0.013). Disruption/redirection distinction confirmed under maximum V effort. V-only late produced 1/24 garbage change but 0 numeric redirects.
next_planned: Priority: (1) Third model family K>V replication. (2) Evidence consolidation (33 cycles). (3) Targeted K-only PGD. (4) Sparse attention analysis.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. Combined p=0.013 (K 6/56 vs V 0/57). Survives maximum-effort V-only disconfirmation.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation CROSS-MODEL REPLICATED and UNIFIED with null space via K-only PGD. Now statistically significant.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for K>V noise (2 families x 3 positions). K-only PGD on Qwen only. Need 3rd family.

encoding_strategy.status: Digital/analog distinction confirmed. K-specific null space on Qwen

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen. Routing+throughput cascade

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT: K-only PGD 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure is NOT hyperparameter artifact. Null space is routing (K), not content (V).

disruption_vs_redirection.status: NEW: V=disruption (0 numeric redirects ever), K=redirection (2 genuine numeric redirects). Quality distinction holds under maximum V optimization effort.
